title: anthemis tomentosa subsp. scopulorum
intro: Anthemis tomentosa subsp. scopulorum, also known as the woolly chamomile, is a subspecies of Anthemis tomentosa, a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects. The health benefits of Anthemis tomentosa subsp. scopulorum include its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
